---
pagetitle: "Research - Thinh Ong"
description: "Thinh Ong's research on vaccination and population immunity, infectious disease modelling, and outbreak response."
page-layout: full
toc: false
comments: false
anchor-sections: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| output: asis
# Citation indices, refreshed from Google Scholar at build time (24h cache,
# safe fallback). Exposed to the page as window.SCHOLAR for the count-up.
sch <- tryCatch({ source("../code/scholar.R"); get_scholar_indices() },
                error = function(e) list(citations = 313L, hindex = 8L))
cat(sprintf('<script>window.SCHOLAR={citations:%d,hindex:%d};</script>',
            as.integer(sch$citations), as.integer(sch$hindex)))
```

```{=html}
<style>
/* Research page. The shell (hero, panels, contents nav) is the shared .pg-*
   system in theme.scss; everything here is the page's own matte layer,
   namespaced .rx-*, using the shared tokens. No gloss: flat hue tiles with a
   real grain. Motion is the "Draw" style, each symbol draws/assembles itself
   as it scrolls in. Opacity/transform/stroke only. */

/* hero: Scholar + CV up top, then two auto-updating stats */
.rx-actions{ display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:10px; margin-top:16px; }
.rx-cta{ display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:.5rem; font-size:.84rem; font-weight:600; padding:9px 15px; border-radius:999px; border:1px solid var(--border); background:var(--surface); color:var(--heading); transition:border-color .2s var(--e),color .2s var(--e),transform .2s var(--e); }
.rx-cta svg{ width:15px; height:15px; stroke:currentColor; fill:none; stroke-width:1.8; }
.rx-cta--p{ background:var(--brand); border-color:var(--brand); color:#fff; }
.rx-cta:active{ transform:scale(.97); }
.rx-stats{ display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:1.4rem; margin-top:18px; }
.rx-stat{ display:flex; flex-direction:column; line-height:1; }
.rx-stat b{ font-family:"Bebas Neue",sans-serif; font-weight:400; font-size:2.4rem; line-height:1; color:var(--brand); }
.rx-stat span{ margin-top:.4rem; font-size:.72rem; letter-spacing:.06em; color:var(--text-faint); }
.rx-sep{ width:1px; height:34px; background:var(--border); }

/* matte tile recipe (matches the Teaching cards) */
.rx-img{ position:relative; overflow:hidden; border-radius:14px; display:grid; place-items:center;
  --deep:color-mix(in srgb,var(--hue) 55%,#0b1228); --mid:var(--hue);
  --lite:color-mix(in srgb,var(--hue) 58%,#ffffff); --soft:color-mix(in srgb,var(--hue) 80%,#ffffff);
  background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--hue) 26%,#ffffff); }
html[data-theme="dark"] .rx-img{ background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--hue) 26%,var(--bg-2)); }
.rx-art{ width:66%; height:66%; display:block; transition:transform .4s var(--e); }

/* labels used inside features */
.rx-kicker{ display:inline-block; font-size:.68rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.16em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--brand); }
.rx-role{ display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; font-size:.68rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.16em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--brand); }
.rx-role svg{ width:14px; height:14px; stroke:currentColor; fill:none; stroke-width:1.8; }

/* feature block (research focus, and HCDC) */
.rx-feature{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:150px 1fr; gap:clamp(16px,2.4vw,26px); align-items:center; background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:16px; padding:clamp(16px,2vw,22px); margin-bottom:clamp(14px,1.8vw,18px); }
html[data-theme="dark"] .rx-feature{ background:rgba(255,255,255,.05); }
.rx-feature .rx-img{ aspect-ratio:1; width:100%; }
.rx-feature h3{ margin:.5rem 0 0; font-size:1.12rem; font-weight:600; color:var(--heading); line-height:1.3; }
.rx-feature p{ margin:.45rem 0 0; color:var(--text-muted); font-size:.92rem; line-height:1.6; max-width:56ch; }
.rx-vision{ margin:.7rem 0 0; padding-left:14px; border-left:2px solid color-mix(in srgb,var(--brand) 45%,var(--border)); color:var(--text); font-size:.9rem; line-height:1.6; max-width:56ch; }
.rx-pill{ display:inline-block; margin-top:12px; font-size:.72rem; font-weight:600; color:var(--brand); background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--brand) 12%,transparent); border-radius:999px; padding:5px 12px; }

/* work cards (Teaching-style) */
.rx-cards{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr); gap:14px; }
.rx-card{ display:block; }
.rx-card .rx-img{ aspect-ratio:5/4; transition:transform .4s var(--e),box-shadow .4s var(--e); }
.rx-card:active .rx-img{ transform:translateY(-2px) scale(.99); }
.rx-meta{ margin:9px 2px 0; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; }
.rx-tag{ font-size:.62rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.04em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--brand-soft); }
.rx-yr{ margin-left:auto; font-size:.72rem; color:var(--text-faint); font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums; }
.rx-name{ margin:5px 2px 0; font-size:.92rem; font-weight:500; line-height:1.32; color:var(--heading); transition:color .25s var(--e); }

/* methods chips */
.rx-caps{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:12px; }
.rx-cap{ display:flex; gap:12px; align-items:flex-start; background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:12px; padding:14px 16px; transition:transform .3s var(--e),border-color .3s var(--e); }
html[data-theme="dark"] .rx-cap{ background:rgba(255,255,255,.05); }
.rx-cap .ic{ flex:none; width:32px; height:32px; border-radius:9px; display:grid; place-items:center; color:var(--brand); background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--brand) 10%,transparent); }
.rx-cap .ic svg{ width:17px; height:17px; stroke:currentColor; fill:none; stroke-width:1.7; }
.rx-cap b{ font-size:.92rem; font-weight:600; color:var(--heading); }
.rx-cap span{ display:block; margin-top:2px; font-size:.8rem; color:var(--text-muted); line-height:1.45; }

/* foundations pills */
.rx-found{ display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:9px; }
.rx-fpill{ font-size:.84rem; font-weight:500; color:var(--text-muted); background:var(--surface); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:999px; padding:8px 14px; transition:transform .2s var(--e),border-color .2s var(--e); }
html[data-theme="dark"] .rx-fpill{ background:rgba(255,255,255,.04); }
.rx-found-note{ margin:14px 2px 0; font-size:.82rem; color:var(--text-faint); }

/* entrance: rise + fade (panels fade via the shared .pg system); --d staggers */
.pg.anim .rise{ opacity:0; transform:translateY(16px); transition:opacity .6s var(--e) var(--d,0s),transform .6s var(--e) var(--d,0s); }
.pg.anim .rise.in{ opacity:1; transform:none; }

/* Draw: each matte symbol draws / assembles itself when its card reveals */
@keyframes rxDraw{ to{ stroke-dashoffset:0; } }
@keyframes rxFade{ to{ opacity:1; } }
@keyframes rxPop{ to{ opacity:1; transform:scale(1); } }
@keyframes rxFill{ to{ transform:scaleY(1); } }
.pg.anim .d-line{ stroke-dasharray:320; stroke-dashoffset:320; }
.pg.anim .d-grid{ stroke-dasharray:170; stroke-dashoffset:170; }
.pg.anim .d-area{ opacity:0; }
.pg.anim .d-face,.pg.anim .d-orb{ opacity:0; transform-box:fill-box; transform-origin:center; transform:scale(.5); }
.pg.anim .d-liquid{ transform-box:fill-box; transform-origin:50% 100%; transform:scaleY(0); }
.pg.anim .rx-card.in .d-line,.pg.anim .rx-feature.in .d-line{ animation:rxDraw 1.1s var(--e) var(--d,0s) forwards; }
.pg.anim .rx-card.in .d-grid,.pg.anim .rx-feature.in .d-grid{ animation:rxDraw 1s var(--e) calc(var(--d,0s) + .25s) forwards; }
.pg.anim .rx-card.in .d-area,.pg.anim .rx-feature.in .d-area{ animation:rxFade .9s var(--e) calc(var(--d,0s) + .3s) forwards; }
.pg.anim .rx-card.in .d-orb,.pg.anim .rx-feature.in .d-orb{ animation:rxPop .6s var(--e) calc(var(--d,0s) + .05s) forwards; }
.pg.anim .rx-card.in .d-f1{ animation:rxPop .5s var(--e) calc(var(--d,0s) + .05s) forwards; }
.pg.anim .rx-card.in .d-f2{ animation:rxPop .5s var(--e) calc(var(--d,0s) + .17s) forwards; }
.pg.anim .rx-card.in .d-f3{ animation:rxPop .5s var(--e) calc(var(--d,0s) + .29s) forwards; }
.pg.anim .rx-card.in .d-liquid{ animation:rxFill .9s var(--e) calc(var(--d,0s) + .2s) forwards; }

@media (hover:hover){
  .rx-card:hover .rx-img{ transform:translateY(-5px); box-shadow:var(--card-shadow); }
  .rx-card:hover .rx-art{ transform:scale(1.05); }
  .rx-card:hover .rx-name{ color:var(--brand); }
  .rx-cta:hover{ border-color:var(--brand); color:var(--brand); }
  .rx-cta--p:hover{ color:#fff; background:var(--brand-soft); border-color:var(--brand-soft); }
  .rx-cap:hover{ transform:translateY(-3px); border-color:color-mix(in srgb,var(--brand) 24%,var(--border)); }
  .rx-fpill:hover{ transform:translateY(-2px); border-color:var(--brand-soft); }
}
@media (max-width:680px){
  .rx-cards{ grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr); }
  .rx-feature{ grid-template-columns:1fr; }
  .rx-feature .rx-img{ max-width:150px; }
  .rx-caps{ grid-template-columns:1fr; }
}
@media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){
  .pg.anim .rise, .pg.anim .rise.in{ opacity:1 !important; transform:none !important; transition:none !important; }
  .pg.anim .d-line, .pg.anim .d-grid{ stroke-dashoffset:0 !important; }
  .pg.anim .d-area, .pg.anim .d-orb, .pg.anim .d-face{ opacity:1 !important; transform:none !important; }
  .pg.anim .d-liquid{ transform:scaleY(1) !important; }
  .pg.anim .rx-card.in .d-line, .pg.anim .rx-feature.in .d-line, .pg.anim .rx-card.in .d-grid, .pg.anim .rx-feature.in .d-grid, .pg.anim .rx-card.in .d-area, .pg.anim .rx-feature.in .d-area, .pg.anim .rx-card.in .d-orb, .pg.anim .rx-feature.in .d-orb, .pg.anim .rx-card.in .d-f1, .pg.anim .rx-card.in .d-f2, .pg.anim .rx-card.in .d-f3, .pg.anim .rx-card.in .d-liquid{ animation:none !important; }
  .rx-img, .rx-art, .rx-cta, .rx-cap, .rx-fpill{ transition:none !important; }
}
</style>

<svg width="0" height="0" style="position:absolute" aria-hidden="true">
  <filter id="rx-grain"><feTurbulence type="fractalNoise" baseFrequency="0.9" numOctaves="2" stitchTiles="stitch"/><feColorMatrix type="saturate" values="0"/><feComponentTransfer><feFuncA type="linear" slope="0.55"/></feComponentTransfer></filter>
</svg>

<section class="pg">

  <!-- HERO -->
  <div class="pg-hero">
    <div class="pg-hero__head">
      <span class="pg-eyebrow">Infectious disease modelling</span>
      <h1 class="pg-title">Research <span class="pg-title-thin">&amp; Advisory</span></h1>
    </div>
    <div class="pg-hero__aside">
      <p class="pg-lead">I work on vaccination and population immunity, turning routine data into models of outbreak risk, and I bring those methods to research across clinical and basic science.</p>
      <div class="rx-actions">
        <a class="rx-cta rx-cta--p" href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=PkfvVs0AAAAJ" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 14 4 9l8-5 8 5z"/><path d="M4 9v6l8 5 8-5V9"/></svg>Google Scholar</a>
        <a class="rx-cta" href="../cv/cv.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M6 2h9l5 5v15H6z"/><path d="M14 2v6h6M9 13h6M9 17h6"/></svg>Full CV</a>
      </div>
      <div class="rx-stats">
        <div class="rx-stat"><b class="ct" data-key="citations" data-fallback="313">0</b><span>Citations</span></div>
        <span class="rx-sep"></span>
        <div class="rx-stat"><b class="ct" data-key="hindex" data-fallback="8">0</b><span>h-index</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pg-body">
    <main class="pg-main">

      <!-- [01] OWN RESEARCH: vaccination & population immunity -->
      <section class="pg-panel" id="focus">
        <div class="pg-sechead">
          <div><span class="pg-num">[01]</span><h2 class="pg-sectitle">Vaccination &amp; immunity</h2><p class="pg-secsub">What I'm working on now.</p></div>
          <span class="pg-count">Current</span>
        </div>

        <article class="rx-feature rise" style="--d:0s">
          <div class="rx-img" style="--hue:#7d92d6">
            <svg class="rx-art" viewBox="0 0 120 120">
              <defs><clipPath id="cpShield"><path d="M60,16 L98,30 L98,62 C98,86 81,101 60,107 C39,101 22,86 22,62 L22,30 Z"/></clipPath></defs>
              <path class="d-orb" d="M60,16 L98,30 L98,62 C98,86 81,101 60,107 C39,101 22,86 22,62 L22,30 Z" fill="var(--mid)"/>
              <g fill="none" stroke="var(--lite)" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"><path class="d-grid" d="M50,60 a14,14 0 0 1 20,0" opacity=".9"/><path class="d-grid" d="M44,52 a23,23 0 0 1 32,0" opacity=".6"/></g>
              <circle cx="60" cy="66" r="5" fill="var(--lite)"/>
              <g clip-path="url(#cpShield)" style="mix-blend-mode:soft-light;opacity:.5"><rect x="0" y="0" width="120" height="120" filter="url(#rx-grain)"/></g>
            </svg>
          </div>
          <div>
            <span class="rx-kicker">Research focus</span>
            <h3>Quantifying population immunity</h3>
            <p>Measuring population immunity remains a persistent challenge. My research integrates routine data streams to quantify it, and to understand how immunity and transmission together shape outbreak risk.</p>
            <p class="rx-vision">The long-term goal: build sustainable surveillance that stays low cost but effective, so public health can move from monitoring the past to forecasting future immunity and guiding proactive response.</p>
          </div>
        </article>

        <div class="rx-cards">
          <a class="rx-card rise" style="--hue:#7d92d6; --d:.05s" href="https://doi.org/10.3201/eid3110.250234" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
            <div class="rx-img">
              <svg class="rx-art" viewBox="0 0 120 120">
                <defs><clipPath id="cpCurve"><path d="M14,98 C36,94 48,86 60,58 C68,40 74,28 86,28 C98,28 104,66 110,78 L110,98 Z"/></clipPath></defs>
                <path class="d-area" d="M14,98 C36,94 48,86 60,58 C68,40 74,28 86,28 C98,28 104,66 110,78 L110,98 Z" fill="var(--mid)"/>
                <path class="d-line" d="M14,96 C36,92 48,84 60,56 C68,38 74,26 86,26 C98,26 104,64 110,76" fill="none" stroke="var(--deep)" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
                <g clip-path="url(#cpCurve)" style="mix-blend-mode:soft-light;opacity:.5"><rect x="0" y="0" width="120" height="120" filter="url(#rx-grain)"/></g>
              </svg>
            </div>
            <div class="rx-meta"><span class="rx-tag">First author</span><span class="rx-yr">2025</span></div>
            <p class="rx-name">Measles immunity gap, caught before the outbreak</p>
          </a>

          <a class="rx-card rise" style="--hue:#9485cf; --d:.18s" href="https://doi.org/10.1111/2041-210X.70256" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
            <div class="rx-img">
              <svg class="rx-art" viewBox="0 0 120 120">
                <defs><clipPath id="cpCube"><polygon points="60,26 86,41 86,77 60,92 34,77 34,41"/></clipPath></defs>
                <polygon class="d-face d-f1" points="60,26 86,41 60,56 34,41" fill="var(--lite)"/>
                <polygon class="d-face d-f2" points="34,41 60,56 60,92 34,77" fill="var(--deep)"/>
                <polygon class="d-face d-f3" points="86,41 60,56 60,92 86,77" fill="var(--mid)"/>
                <g clip-path="url(#cpCube)" style="mix-blend-mode:soft-light;opacity:.45"><rect x="0" y="0" width="120" height="120" filter="url(#rx-grain)"/></g>
              </svg>
            </div>
            <div class="rx-meta"><span class="rx-tag">First author</span><span class="rx-yr">2026</span></div>
            <p class="rx-name">denim: the compartmental modelling engine</p>
          </a>

          <a class="rx-card rise" style="--hue:#6fae9a; --d:.31s" href="https://doi.org/10.1136/bmjgh-2025-019111" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
            <div class="rx-img">
              <svg class="rx-art" viewBox="0 0 120 120">
                <defs><clipPath id="cpGlobe"><circle cx="60" cy="59" r="33"/></clipPath></defs>
                <circle class="d-orb" cx="60" cy="59" r="33" fill="var(--mid)"/>
                <g clip-path="url(#cpGlobe)" fill="none" stroke="var(--deep)" stroke-width="3" opacity=".7"><ellipse class="d-grid" cx="60" cy="59" rx="13" ry="33"/><line class="d-grid" x1="27" y1="49" x2="93" y2="49"/><line class="d-grid" x1="27" y1="69" x2="93" y2="69"/></g>
                <g clip-path="url(#cpGlobe)" style="mix-blend-mode:soft-light;opacity:.5"><rect x="0" y="0" width="120" height="120" filter="url(#rx-grain)"/></g>
              </svg>
            </div>
            <div class="rx-meta"><span class="rx-tag">Co-author</span><span class="rx-yr">2025</span></div>
            <p class="rx-name">Modelling capacity for the global south</p>
          </a>

          <a class="rx-card rise" style="--hue:#5fa6c6; --d:.44s" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.vaccine.2026.128375" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
            <div class="rx-img">
              <svg class="rx-art" viewBox="0 0 120 120">
                <defs><clipPath id="cpVial"><rect x="47" y="22" width="26" height="72" rx="9"/></clipPath></defs>
                <rect x="47" y="22" width="26" height="72" rx="9" fill="var(--lite)"/>
                <g clip-path="url(#cpVial)"><rect class="d-liquid" x="47" y="50" width="26" height="44" fill="var(--mid)"/></g>
                <rect x="43" y="16" width="34" height="13" rx="5" fill="var(--deep)"/>
                <g clip-path="url(#cpVial)" style="mix-blend-mode:soft-light;opacity:.5"><rect x="0" y="0" width="120" height="120" filter="url(#rx-grain)"/></g>
              </svg>
            </div>
            <div class="rx-meta"><span class="rx-tag">Co-author</span><span class="rx-yr">2026</span></div>
            <p class="rx-name">Infants under six months, most at risk</p>
          </a>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- [02] ADVISORY: capacity building with HCDC -->
      <section class="pg-panel" id="advisory">
        <div class="pg-sechead">
          <div><span class="pg-num">[02]</span><h2 class="pg-sectitle">Capacity building</h2><p class="pg-secsub">Advising Ho Chi Minh City CDC.</p></div>
          <span class="pg-count">Advisory</span>
        </div>

        <article class="rx-feature rise" style="--d:0s">
          <div class="rx-img" style="--hue:#6fae9a">
            <svg class="rx-art" viewBox="0 0 120 120">
              <defs><clipPath id="cpNet"><circle cx="60" cy="60" r="47"/></clipPath></defs>
              <g clip-path="url(#cpNet)">
                <g stroke="var(--deep)" stroke-width="3" opacity=".55"><line class="d-grid" x1="60" y1="60" x2="60" y2="28"/><line class="d-grid" x1="60" y1="60" x2="92" y2="60"/><line class="d-grid" x1="60" y1="60" x2="60" y2="92"/><line class="d-grid" x1="60" y1="60" x2="28" y2="60"/></g>
                <circle class="d-orb" cx="60" cy="28" r="8" fill="var(--lite)"/><circle class="d-orb" cx="92" cy="60" r="8" fill="var(--deep)"/><circle class="d-orb" cx="60" cy="92" r="8" fill="var(--lite)"/><circle class="d-orb" cx="28" cy="60" r="8" fill="var(--deep)"/>
                <circle class="d-orb" cx="60" cy="60" r="12" fill="var(--mid)"/>
                <g style="mix-blend-mode:soft-light;opacity:.5"><rect x="0" y="0" width="120" height="120" filter="url(#rx-grain)"/></g>
              </g>
            </svg>
          </div>
          <div>
            <span class="rx-role"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2 4 6v6c0 5 3.4 8.5 8 10 4.6-1.5 8-5 8-10V6z"/><path d="m9 12 2 2 4-4"/></svg>Advisor &amp; research supervisor</span>
            <h3>Capacity building with Ho Chi Minh City CDC</h3>
            <p>I train HCDC's in-house modelling team and advise their research, building the local capacity to model outbreaks and turn analysis into action.</p>
            <span class="rx-pill">Training the in-house modelling team &middot; research supervision</span>
          </div>
        </article>
      </section>

      <!-- [03] METHODS & COLLABORATION -->
      <section class="pg-panel" id="methods">
        <div class="pg-sechead">
          <div><span class="pg-num">[03]</span><h2 class="pg-sectitle">Methods &amp; collaboration</h2><p class="pg-secsub">How I help other teams' studies.</p></div>
          <span class="pg-count">Support</span>
        </div>
        <div class="rx-caps">
          <div class="rx-cap rise" style="--d:0s"><span class="ic"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M3 3v18h18"/><path d="M7 15c2-6 4-8 6-8s2 4 4 4 2-3 3-4"/></svg></span><div><b>Bayesian &amp; multilevel modelling</b><span>Hierarchical models for clustered cohort and survey data.</span></div></div>
          <div class="rx-cap rise" style="--d:.07s"><span class="ic"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M9 3h6M10 3v5l-5 9a2 2 0 0 0 2 3h10a2 2 0 0 0 2-3l-5-9V3"/></svg></span><div><b>Trials &amp; study design</b><span>Randomised trials, sample size, prognostic models.</span></div></div>
          <div class="rx-cap rise" style="--d:.14s"><span class="ic"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M4 5h16M4 12h10M4 19h7"/><circle cx="18" cy="16" r="3"/></svg></span><div><b>Survey development &amp; validation</b><span>Cross-cultural adaptation, reliability and validity.</span></div></div>
          <div class="rx-cap rise" style="--d:.21s"><span class="ic"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M6 3v6a6 6 0 0 0 12 0V3"/><path d="M6 21v-6a6 6 0 0 1 12 0v6"/><path d="M6 12h12"/></svg></span><div><b>Genomics &amp; biomarker pipelines</b><span>Reproducible tools for sequencing and methylation panels.</span></div></div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- [04] FOUNDATIONS -->
      <section class="pg-panel" id="foundations">
        <div class="pg-sechead">
          <div><span class="pg-num">[04]</span><h2 class="pg-sectitle">Foundations</h2><p class="pg-secsub">The range I came through.</p></div>
          <span class="pg-count">Earlier work</span>
        </div>
        <div class="rx-found">
          <span class="rx-fpill">Neonatal trials</span><span class="rx-fpill">Reproductive medicine</span><span class="rx-fpill">HLA genetics</span><span class="rx-fpill">Transplantation</span><span class="rx-fpill">Epigenomics</span><span class="rx-fpill">Bioinformatics</span><span class="rx-fpill">Clinical biomarkers</span>
        </div>
        <p class="rx-found-note">The full record, with every paper and venue, lives in the CV.</p>
      </section>

    </main>

    <nav class="pg-toc" aria-label="Sections on this page">
      <p class="pg-toc-h">On this page</p>
      <a href="#focus" class="active"><span class="tn">01</span><span class="tt">Vaccination</span></a>
      <a href="#advisory"><span class="tn">02</span><span class="tt">Advisory</span></a>
      <a href="#methods"><span class="tn">03</span><span class="tt">Methods</span></a>
      <a href="#foundations"><span class="tn">04</span><span class="tt">Foundations</span></a>
    </nav>
  </div>
</section>

<script>
(function(){
  var root = document.querySelector(".pg");
  if(!root) return;
  var reduce = window.matchMedia && window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)").matches;

  // count-up, values come from window.SCHOLAR (build-time Scholar fetch)
  function countUp(el){
    var key = el.getAttribute("data-key");
    var S = window.SCHOLAR || {};
    var to = (S && typeof S[key] === "number") ? S[key] : (parseInt(el.getAttribute("data-fallback"),10) || 0);
    if(reduce){ el.textContent = to; return; }
    var n = 0, step = Math.max(1, Math.round(to/28));
    var t = setInterval(function(){ n += step; if(n >= to){ n = to; clearInterval(t); } el.textContent = n; }, 40);
  }

  if("IntersectionObserver" in window){
    root.classList.add("anim");
    var pan = new IntersectionObserver(function(es){ es.forEach(function(e){ if(e.isIntersecting){ e.target.classList.add("in"); pan.unobserve(e.target); } }); }, { threshold:0.12 });
    root.querySelectorAll(".pg-panel").forEach(function(p){ pan.observe(p); });
    var rev = new IntersectionObserver(function(es){ es.forEach(function(e){ if(e.isIntersecting){ e.target.classList.add("in"); rev.unobserve(e.target); } }); }, { threshold:0.2 });
    root.querySelectorAll(".rise").forEach(function(el){ rev.observe(el); });
    var ctO = new IntersectionObserver(function(es){ es.forEach(function(e){ if(e.isIntersecting){ countUp(e.target); ctO.unobserve(e.target); } }); }, { threshold:0.6 });
    root.querySelectorAll(".ct").forEach(function(el){ ctO.observe(el); });
  } else {
    root.querySelectorAll(".rise").forEach(function(el){ el.classList.add("in"); });
    root.querySelectorAll(".ct").forEach(countUp);
  }

  // contents-nav scrollspy (matches the shared .pg pages)
  var links = root.querySelectorAll(".pg-toc a");
  var panels = Array.prototype.slice.call(root.querySelectorAll(".pg-panel[id]"));
  function linkFor(id){ for(var i=0;i<links.length;i++){ if(links[i].hash === "#"+id) return links[i]; } return null; }
  function setActive(link){ links.forEach(function(l){ l.classList.toggle("active", l === link); }); }
  var navLock = false, lockT, ticking = false;
  function syncActive(){
    ticking = false;
    if(navLock || !panels.length) return;
    var line = window.innerHeight * 0.28, current = panels[0];
    panels.forEach(function(p){ if(p.getBoundingClientRect().top <= line) current = p; });
    setActive(linkFor(current.id));
  }
  function onScroll(){ if(!ticking){ ticking = true; requestAnimationFrame(syncActive); } }
  window.addEventListener("scroll", onScroll, { passive:true });
  window.addEventListener("resize", onScroll, { passive:true });
  syncActive();
  links.forEach(function(a){
    a.addEventListener("click", function(){
      navLock = true; setActive(a);
      clearTimeout(lockT);
      lockT = setTimeout(function(){ navLock = false; syncActive(); }, reduce ? 0 : 700);
    });
  });
})();
</script>
```
